controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on declaration of dividend and remittance of profits) directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividend and Remittance of Profits) Directions,
2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on declaration of dividend and remittance of profits) directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from financial year (fy) 2026-27
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect from Financial Year (FY) 2026-27.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from financial year (fy) 2026-27

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all banking companies, corresponding new banks and state bank of india as defined under subsections (c), (da) and (nc) of section 5 o
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to all banking companies, corresponding new
banks and State Bank of India as defined under subsections (c), (da) and (nc) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act,1949, and foreign banks operating as
branch(es), excluding Small Finance Banks (SFBs), Local Area Banks (LABs),
Payments Banks (PBs), and Regional Rural Banks (RRBs), hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all banking companies, corresponding new banks and state bank of india as defined under subsections (c), (da) and (nc) of section 5 o

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below

controls.control_objective: To ensure pat of the financial year for which the dividend is proposed to be paid minus 50 per cent of net npa as on march 31 of the financial year for which th
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pat of the financial year for which the dividend is proposed to be paid minus 50 per cent of net npa as on march 31 of the financial year for which th

controls.control_objective: To ensure dividend payable on equity shares and includes interim dividend but excludes dividend on perpetual non-cumulative preference shares (pncps)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Dividend' means dividend payable on equity shares and includes interim dividend
but excludes dividend on Perpetual Non-Cumulative Preference Shares (PNCPS);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to dividend payable on equity shares and includes interim dividend but excludes dividend on perpetual non-cumulative preference shares (pncps)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Extra-ordinary profit / income' shall have the same meaning as defined under
applicable Accounting Standards;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined under applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure repatriation of profit by a foreign bank operating in india in branch mode to its head office
controls.control_description:
and
(4) 'Remittance of profit' means repatriation of profit by a foreign bank operating in
India in branch mode to its Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to repatriation of profit by a foreign bank operating in india in branch mode to its head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the applicable Acts, Rules / Regulations made
thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or r

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the following: (1) the divergence in asset classification and provisioning for non-performing assets (npas), including its trend, as observed
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors1 while considering the proposal for declaration of dividend
or remittance of profit of a bank shall consider the following:
(1) The divergence in asset classification and provisioning for Non-Performing Assets
(NPAs), including its trend, as observed if any, under supervisory findings of the
Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the following: (1) the divergence in asset classification and provisioning for non-performing assets (npas), including its trend, as observed

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the following prudential requirements, to be eligible to declare dividends or remit profits
controls.control_description:
A bank shall meet the following prudential requirements, to be eligible to declare
dividends or remit profits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the following prudential requirements, to be eligible to declare dividends or remit profits

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be in compliance as at the end of the financial year during which the dividend is proposed to be paid
controls.control_description:
(1) The bank was in compliance with the applicable regulatory capital requirement as
at the end of the previous financial year and shall continue to be in compliance as at
the end of the financial year during which the dividend is proposed to be paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be in compliance as at the end of the financial year during which the dividend is proposed to be paid

controls.control_objective: To ensure fall below the applicable regulatory capital requirement even after the payment of dividend
controls.control_description:
(2) The regulatory capital of the bank shall not fall below the applicable regulatory
capital requirement even after the payment of dividend.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fall below the applicable regulatory capital requirement even after the payment of dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure have positive adjusted profit after tax (pat) for the period for which the dividend is proposed
controls.control_description:
(3) The bank incorporated in India shall have positive adjusted Profit After Tax (PAT)
for the period for which the dividend is proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have positive adjusted profit after tax (pat) for the period for which the dividend is proposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure have positive pat for the period for which the profits are to be remitted to the head office
controls.control_description:
(4) A foreign bank operating in India in the branch mode, shall have positive PAT for
the period for which the profits are to be remitted to the Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have positive pat for the period for which the profits are to be remitted to the head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under any explicit restrictions for declaration of dividends or remittance of profits from the reserve bank or any other authority
controls.control_description:
(5) The bank shall not be under any explicit restrictions for declaration of dividends or
remittance of profits from the Reserve Bank or any other authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under any explicit restrictions for declaration of dividends or remittance of profits from the reserve bank or any other authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read as the bank's management
controls.control_description: 1 In case of foreign banks operating in India in the branch mode, this shall be read as the bank's management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read as the bank's management

controls.control_objective: To ensure declare and pay dividend up to the limits prescribed under table 1 below, but in aggregate not exceeding 75% of the pat for the period for which the d
controls.control_description:
A bank incorporated in India which satisfies the eligibility criteria laid down in
paragraph 7 above, may declare and pay dividend up to the limits prescribed under
Table 1 below, but in aggregate not exceeding 75% of the PAT for the period for which
the dividend is being proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to declare and pay dividend up to the limits prescribed under table 1 below, but in aggregate not exceeding 75% of the pat for the period for which the d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be zero for a bank not classified as d-sib
controls.control_description: 'z' shall be zero for a bank not classified as D-SIB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be zero for a bank not classified as d-sib

controls.control_objective: To ensure return the excess remittance and make good the shortfall
controls.control_description:
A foreign bank operating in India in branch mode, that satisfies the eligibility criteria
as specified in paragraph 7 above, may remit net profit / surplus (net of tax) earned in
the normal course of business arising out of its Indian operations, without prior
approval of the Reserve Bank, subject to the conditions that the accounts of the bank
are audited and in the event of excess remittance, if any, the Head Office of that foreign
bank immediately shall return the excess remittance and make good the shortfall.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to return the excess remittance and make good the shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for payment of dividend / repatriation of profit by foreign banks operating in india in branch mode: (1) any exceptional and / or extra-o
controls.control_description:
The following profits shall not be available for payment of dividend / repatriation of
profit by foreign banks operating in India in branch mode:
(1) Any exceptional and / or extra-ordinary profits / income shall not be available for
payment of dividend / remittance of profit by foreign banks operating in branch mode
in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for payment of dividend / repatriation of profit by foreign banks operating in india in branch mode: (1) any exceptional and / or extra-o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for payment of dividend / remittance of profit by foreign banks operating in branch mode in india, to the extent it is included in pat
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) If the audit report by the statutory auditor contains a modified opinion that indicates
an overstatement of the PAT, the same shall not be available for payment of dividend
/ remittance of profit by foreign banks operating in branch mode in India, to the extent
it is included in PAT.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for payment of dividend / remittance of profit by foreign banks operating in branch mode in india, to the extent it is included in pat

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay dividend or repatriate profits out of net unrealised gains arising on fair valuation of level 3 financial instruments (including derivatives)
controls.control_description:
(3) In terms of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Classification, Valuation
and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025, a bank shall not pay dividend
or repatriate profits out of net unrealised gains arising on fair valuation of Level 3
financial instruments (including derivatives).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay dividend or repatriate profits out of net unrealised gains arising on fair valuation of level 3 financial instruments (including derivatives)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(4) The prudential treatment of reversal of excess provision, dividend payment or
remittance of profits by a bank on reversal of such provisions and unrealized profits
arising on account of transfer of loans and Security Receipts guaranteed by the
Government of India shall be guided by the instructions contained in the Reserve Bank
of India (Commercial Banks - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - transfer and distribution of credit risk) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure report details thereof as per the format prescribed in annex ii
controls.control_description:
A bank paying dividend or remitting profits to Head Office shall report details
thereof as per the format prescribed in Annex II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report details thereof as per the format prescribed in annex ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished to the department of supervision of the reserve bank within a fortnight of declaration of dividend / remitting profits to head office
controls.control_description:
The report shall be furnished to the
Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank within a fortnight of declaration of
dividend / remitting profits to Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished to the department of supervision of the reserve bank within a fortnight of declaration of dividend / remitting profits to head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract supervisory and / or enforcement action, as applicable
controls.control_description:
Non-compliance with any of the provisions contained in these Directions may
attract supervisory and / or enforcement action, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract supervisory and / or enforcement action, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further, the
repeal of these Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelin
controls.control_description:
and any
such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or
enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those
Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank̥ may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
<image>
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure the ratio of the amount of the dividend payable on equity shares (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit during the year as per the
controls.control_description: 'Dividend Payout Ratio (DPR)' means the ratio of the amount of the dividend payable on equity shares (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit during the year as per the audited financial statements for the financial year for which the dividend is proposed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the ratio of the amount of the dividend payable on equity shares (including interim dividend) in a year and the net profit during the year as per the
